articles.title: Loneliness may be silently eroding your memory, new research reveals
articles.description: New research suggests loneliness affects older adults' baseline memory performance but may not directly accelerate cognitive decline over time.

articles.title: HPV: A blame game no one wins
articles.description: Human papillomavirus (HPV) is one of the most common sexually transmitted infections worldwide, and a complex interaction of biological, anatomical, and behavioural factors shapes its transmission dynamics.

articles.title: Poor mental health care 'is forcing GPs in certain parts of the country to dish out pills'
articles.description: Experts claim that a lack of NHS resources in poorer parts of the country mean that, increasingly, GPs are relying on antidepressants to treat patients.

articles.title: Eating too much salt may permanently damage men's memories - while abstaining could help delay the onset of dementia
articles.description: A study found those consuming too much sodium saw a decline in their memory over a six-year period - particularly when trying to recall events.

articles.title: How to beat the athlete's foot epidemic. Cases of this embarrassing problem are soaring - here's how to avoid it, and the one common mistake so many women are making
articles.description: It often begins with something so minor you barely register it - a faint itch between the toes. But experts warn these signs can be the first hint of a condition that is becoming increasingly hard to treat.

articles.title: We lost stones on Mounjaro, but gained this life-changing problem. Meet the women who say that their weight-loss jabs have resulted in a shocking side-effect you've never heard before...
articles.description: Research has suggested that, in addition to changes in digestion, GLP-1 drugs may influence brain pathways. One weight-loss jab user said: 'I feel like Mounjaro has stolen one of my pleasures in life.'

articles.title: Hospital visits for migraine treatment spike when air pollution is at its highest
articles.description: Hot and humid weather conditions are also associated with increased likelihood of the debilitating headaches, a study of sufferers reveals.

articles.title: One man’s obsessive quest to weigh the human soul
articles.description: The 21 grams experiment continues to fascinate us a century later. The post One man’s obsessive quest to weigh the human soul appeared first on Popular Science .

articles.title: Blood test may be more effective and cost-efficient than standard cholesterol tests
articles.description: A new study adds to growing research that apoB testing may be more effective for guiding cholesterol treatment than the current guidelines, and also highlights the cost-effectiveness of the test.

articles.title: Bickering with your partner could be the secret to a lasting relationship - as long as you make up afterwards
articles.description: Couples who argue openly then resolve their differences grow closer over time, according to researchers who tracked brain activity during disagreements.
